title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 16 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 16 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 16 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 16/02/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 1.79 % today, the main contract closed 880.The traders' willingness to ship is more. The steel mills are active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is better.PBF at Shandong port deal 882-893 yuan/mt, increase 2-18 yuan/ mt.PBF at Tangshan port deal 883 yuan/mt. At present, there are rumors on the news side, and the market sentiment ﬂuctuates slightly.
